title: Add structured-file inventory and no-freeform check
goal: Add a checked inventory for tracked JSON, TOML, YAML, and YML files so machine-readable repo state is not introduced as unclassified freeform residue.
non_goals: Do not add every missing validator or schema in this slice.
Do not inventory generated caches, virtualenvs, or untracked local outputs.
Do not make prose Markdown part of the structured-file contract.

intent.outcome: Structured files are classified as schema-backed, typed-validator-backed, generated/derived, source-checkout diagnostics, or explicit routed gaps.
intent.constraints: Keep the inventory compact and pattern-based; preserve child issues #504, #505, #506, #508, and #509 for deeper validators.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest schema/check/test surface that prevents new unclassified tracked JSON/TOML/YAML files.
intent.escalation: Stop if the inventory requires broad semantic validation of every historical artifact.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and continue the structured-file contract lane through the validator/schema children.
execution.proof: uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; make structured-file-inventory; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success

invariants: New tracked structured files must be classified before landing.
Remaining validator/schema gaps must be explicit and routed to existing child issues.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #502: require schemas or typed validators for all machine-readable files.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: No; it creates the checked inventory and gap routing needed for child schema work.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #503 lands and the next child issue is selected.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: A cheap no-freeform guardrail over tracked structured files.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Specific validators and schemas for memory manifest, execplan/review records, evidence records, root contract manifests, and package-local artifacts.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: A schema-backed structured-file inventory and checked no-freeform guard now cover tracked JSON/TOML/YAML/YML files, and an injected unclassified structured path fails focused tests.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: Child issues #504, #505, #506, #508, and #509 still need to replace routed gaps with concrete schemas or typed validators.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed <paths> --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Do not refactor contract loading or planning internals for this slice.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Memory manifest validator, execplan/review schemas, evidence schemas, root contract semantic validation, package-local schema work.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Use subagents for read-only inventory/test recommendations while keeping implementation integration local.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Subagents must not edit overlapping files without a disjoint assignment.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Pattern grouping, status names, and check output wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Inventory cannot be kept compact without weakening the no-freeform check.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/contracts/structured_file_inventory.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/structured_file_inventory.schema.json scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py Makefile .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/structured-file-inventory.plan.json --format json
completion_criteria: Checker fails on unclassified tracked structured files.
Checker passes on the current repo.
Remaining gaps are explicitly routed to child issues.

execution_run.what happened: Added structured_file_inventory.json with its own JSON Schema, added a git-ls-files-backed checker for tracked structured files, wired a Makefile target, and covered current coverage plus unclassified-file failure behavior with tests.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; make structured-file-inventory; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success
execution_run.result for continuation: Remaining freeform-prohibited gaps are explicitly routed to #504, #505, #506, #508, and #509.
execution_run.next step: Promote the next child schema/validator issue from the restored structured-file-contract lane.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; deeper validators and schemas stayed routed to child issues.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; the repo now has a checked inventory and fails unclassified tracked structured files.
finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact summary/proof/doctor surfaces and delegated read-only review.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; #503 asked for inventory and no-freeform classification, not complete schema coverage.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; make structured-file-inventory; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success
proof_report.proof achieved now: Structured file inventory validates against its schema, covers every current tracked structured file, and fails unclassified tracked structured paths in focused tests.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 5 focused tests passed, current-repo checker passed, Makefile target passed, workspace CLI suite passed, ruff passed, planning doctor was healthy, and contract-tooling checks passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: #503 add a structured-file inventory and no-freeform check.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The inventory exists, the check fails unclassified structured files, current tracked structured files are covered, and known validator/schema gaps are routed to child issues.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Keep the package lightweight and contract-backed while reducing freeform machine-readable residue.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Add one small guardrail before adding deeper validators.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can future structured files be introduced without an owner/status contract?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #503 is complete, but #502 remains open because routed gaps still need concrete schemas or typed validators.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A tracked JSON/TOML/YAML file can be added without inventory classification.

durable_residue.learned constraint: New tracked structured files should enter through the inventory check rather than as unclassified machine-readable residue.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The contract inventory and checker now carry the reusable rule; the archived plan only preserves proof history.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Tracked structured files now have a compact owner/status inventory and a checked no-freeform guard.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused checker/tests, Make target, workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning doctor, and contract-tooling checks passed.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): none; the durable owner is the new checked contract inventory and checker.
